model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DEPTH = 3","old":"DEPTH = 2","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase MLP capacity and add light dropout to improve representational power within fixed 256-step budget while keeping changes simple and stable.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Revert the over-aggressive LR+scheduler setting that regressed loss and switch to AdamW for better regularization behavior at the prior stable LR under a short fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly increase AdamW step size to improve optimization progress within only 256 training steps without adding extra complexity.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Return to the more stable Adam configuration after the higher-LR AdamW setting regressed sharply, while preserving the stronger architecture changes.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Slightly reduce regularization since dropout is already active, which may improve fit under the short fixed-step training budget.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.08","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Slightly reduce dropout to retain regularization while allowing more fitting capacity in the short training horizon.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Test whether removing L2 penalty helps this short-budget run now that dropout already provides regularization.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.08","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.06","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Restore the slightly better L2 setting and test a modest additional dropout reduction to improve fit without removing regularization.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.06","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.08","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Undo the harmful dropout reduction and return to the strongest regularization setting seen so far.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Try a slightly smaller LR to improve final-loss refinement under fixed 256-step training with the current regularization settings.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Revert the LR reduction, which significantly worsened validation loss, back to the best-performing value.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"With a fixed 256-step budget, increasing batch size exposes the model to more unique training examples, which can improve validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Probe whether exposing even more samples per step further improves loss under the fixed-step evaluator.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue scaling batch size to maximize data coverage per fixed training step and test if validation loss drops further.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Test larger batch to further increase sample coverage per fixed step, which has been the strongest improvement direction so far.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Push batch size further to maximize training-set coverage per fixed update budget, the dominant successful trend so far.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 4096","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue the strongest trend by increasing batch size again, maximizing examples processed within the fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With very large batches, a higher learning rate can improve optimization progress within the same fixed number of steps.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Do a final small LR increase on the large-batch regime, which recently improved loss, to test for a bit more optimization progress.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}
